title: Transparent Glass
description: Gives glass a faint outline and no streaks.
body:
Makes glass have a faint outline and no streaks.

_Before:_
![Old glass texture on a block floating in the sky.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f81fdf7fb357f21d3b9b06c76b9ed542c2c1c48_0.webp)

_After:_
![New glass texture on a block floating in the sky.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/107ed0136f2ad0b8dd06a692bde2b96c5b8deca4_0.webp)
